description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular, single-story structure with a flat roof and a prominent front entrance. The facade is adorned with two green awnings above spacious porches on either side of the central door, both bordered by white railings. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, while the roof is surrounded by a parapet, giving the building a modern, boxy appearance. The front entrance is accentuated by a patterned walkway leading up to double doors with glass panes. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the front, providing balanced natural light. The sides and rear of the building are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and clean, uninterrupted surfaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, green awnings, and symmetrical front porches. The facade features light siding, a central entrance, and minimal side detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two green awnings, symmetrical porches with white railings, and a patterned walkway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the porches, the flat roof, and the mostly solid wall with minimal detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wall with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the building's boxy shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, highlighting the green awning and porch structure, with a clear view of the flat roof.
